core.changelog:
- 🔧 Fixed all first-installation errors (entity_picker, property_bar, property_editor crashes)
- 🔧 Fixed extension property types not loading on first install (ensure_extensions_loaded)
- 🔧 Fixed configuration.json Rewards/Prerequisites ARRAY settings
- 🔧 Cleared hardcoded entity IDs, removed debug prints

premium.changelog:
- Initial premium release
- All Core features included
- Merchant/Trading System
- NPC Scheduled/Routine System
- Equipment System (slot-based, set bonuses)
- Leveling & Progression
- Extended Runtime Item (durability, enchantments, cooldown)
- Reputation System, Level-Gated Quests, Timed Quests
